text:
On Tue, Feb 9, 2010 at 5:04 AM, Alexander Best <alexbestms@wwu.de> wrote:
> could you try again with a fresh HEAD snapshot? i think this got fixed by
> delphij@ in r203584.
>

> alex

Looks good, except that I think /usr/sbin/sendmail should be added to
the MAILWRAPPER sections, since it is a symlink to
/usr/sbin/mailwrapper.

-- 
Rob Farmer
